Coastal Boutique Fitness has served Seattle, WA since 2018. Today we're a team of 11.

pages.homepage_text:
Coastal Boutique Fitness is a boutique fitness in Seattle, WA. Founded 2018. We're a team of 11.
What we do
- Small-group strength
- Private training
- Mobility classes
- Corporate wellness
Get in touch
Email: hello@example.test · Phone: (555) 555-0100
